Road disruption near Bank: Works. [A3217] Kings Road (All directions) at the junction of [A3220] Gunter Grove - Temporary signals in operation to facilitate works by UKPN.

raw.comments: [A3217] Kings Road (All directions) at the junction of [A3220] Gunter Grove - Temporary signals in operation to facilitate works by UKPN.
raw.currentUpdate: Westbound traffic is subject to delays on the approach back to Oakley Street. Gunter Grove has slow moving northbound traffic tailing back intermittently to Cheyne Walk and there are additional delays back along Battersea Bridge and Chelsea Embankment.

summary: Road disruption near Bank: Works. [A3031] Albert Bridge Road (Both directions) at the junction of [A3212] Chelsea Embankment - The bridge is closed for local borough works.

raw.comments: [A3031] Albert Bridge Road (Both directions) at the junction of [A3212] Chelsea Embankment - The bridge is closed for local borough works.
raw.currentUpdate: Use an alternative route. There are northbound delays on Battersea Bridge Road back to Hyde Lane, and  eastbound on Battersea Church Street to Bollingbroke Walk
